title: Ender Compass
description: Compass that points to the nearest end portal.
body:
This mod adds an item called the **ender compass**, which points to the nearest stronghold and is crafted using four eyes of ender surrounding a compass, as follows:

![An ender compass is crafted using a crafting table with a compass at the center and four ender eyes above, below, left, and right of it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3b3ba7162d789af0fe1a39f8ee237cd479c845d.png)

In the nether or end, the compass spins around randomly, as there are no strongholds in these dimensions. The same is true in the overworld if structure generation is disabled.
